## Description
Brief description of the changes made.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Other: ___________

## Testing
- [ ] I have tested this change locally
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have tested the admin dashboard functionality affected by this change

## Screenshots (if applicable)
Add screenshots to help explain your changes.

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published

## Admin Dashboard Specific
- [ ] Fleet management functionality works correctly
- [ ] Booking calendar displays and functions properly
- [ ] Pricing calculations are accurate
- [ ] Data import/export works as expected
- [ ] Google Sheets integration (if applicable) functions correctly
- [ ] Responsive design works on mobile devices
- [ ] Accessibility features are maintained
- [ ] No JavaScript console errors

## Related Issues
Closes #(issue number)
Fixes #(issue number)
Relates to #(issue number)

## Additional Notes
Any additional information or context about the pull request.
